name: Yet Another Spontaneous Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 potato, cubed (note that one cube equals one whole)
(optional) splash of white wine or sake
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add onion and garlic, sauté until the onion becomes translucent.
2. Add tomatoes and continue sautéing for a few minutes.
3. Add patty pan squash and zucchini; sauté another 5-7 minutes until slightly tender.
4. Stir in water to cover the ingredients, then bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat and add garbanzo beans, miso paste, lentils, potatoes, and spices. Simmer for about 10 minutes.
6. Increase heat and simmer uncovered for another 20-30 minutes until lentils are fully cooked.
7. If desired, stir in broccoli florets for added flavor.
